## Evidence

- [ ] I ran `python3 -m unittest discover -v`.
- [ ] I ran the compile command in `README.md`.
- [ ] Dataset examples are fictional or safely licensed.
- [ ] No customer, employer, personal, or secret data is included.

## Eval impact

slices. If this changes a prompt or grader, attach comparable before/after
results or explain why results are not applicable.

## Limitations
